zh.Little Horsted, Sussex, England: 英國素可蕾托 霍斯特德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmond Pope於1496年出生在英國素可布可泰德時，他的父親John Pope31歲，母親Isabelle Pichingham26歲。他於大約1524年與Elizabeth Newdegate結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年5月28日之前在英國素可蕾托 霍斯特德。

zh-hans.Little Horsted, Sussex, England: 英国素可蕾托 霍斯特德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmond Pope于1496年出生在英国素可布可泰德时，他的父亲John Pope31岁，母亲Isabelle Pichingham26岁。他于大约1524年与Elizabeth Newdegate结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年5月28日之前在英国素可蕾托 霍斯特德。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: Edmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Edmund  , now in quite frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmond Pope was born in 1496, in Buxted, Sussex, England, his father, John Pope, was 31 and his mother, Isabelle Pichingham, was 26. He married Elizabeth Newdegate about 1524. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He died before 28 May 1552, in Little Horsted, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmond Pope est né en 1496, à Buxted, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Pope, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Pichingham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Newdegate environ 1524. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé avant 28 mai 1552, à Little Horsted, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmond Pope 1496 in Buxted, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Pope 31 und seine Mutter Isabelle Pichingham 26. Er hat um 1524 Elizabeth Newdegate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb vor 28. Mai 1552 in Little Horsted, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmond Pope è nato il nel 1496 nel Buxted, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Pope, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle Pichingham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Newdegate circa 1524. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì prima del 28 maggio 1552, nel Little Horsted, Sussex, England.

ja.Little Horsted, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスリットル ホールステド
ja.Hendall, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスヘンダル
ja.Hendall, Buxted Sussex, England: イギリススセックスブクステド
ja.Uckfield, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスウクフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Edmond Popeが1496年にイギリススセックスブクステドで生まれた時，父John Popeは31歳，母Isabelle Pichinghamは26歳であった。約1524年にElizabeth Newdegateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年5月28日以前にイギリススセックスリットル ホールステドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmond Pope(이)가 1496년 영국 수세스 버스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pope(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Pichingham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1524년 Elizabeth Newdegate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 5월 28일 이전 영국 수세스 리틀 호르스테드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmond Pope nasceu em 1496, em Buxted, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Pope, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Pichingham, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Newdegate aproximadamente 1524. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 28 de maio de 1552, em Little Horsted, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmond Pope родился в 1496 г. в местности букстед, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Pope было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Pichingham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Newdegate около 1524 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер перед 28 май 1552 г. в местности литл хаурстед, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmond Pope nació en 1496, en Buxted, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Pope, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabelle Pichingham, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Newdegate aproximadamente 1524. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió antes de 28 de mayo de 1552, en Little Horsted, Sussex, Inglaterra.
